'''Forscan IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Forscan system/Legends|Forscan system]] within the [[Auril sector/Legends|Auril sector]].
At some time prior to his mission to [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] traveled to Forscan IV for a mission. He had several close calls there, during one of which his [[Padawan/Legends|padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] saved his life.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1stm}}
*[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}}
